## Change

Explain the runtime problem, design decision, and affected boundaries.

## Verification

- [ ] `python -m pytest -q` passes
- [ ] New behavior has focused tests
- [ ] Optional integrations are tested or explicitly marked unverified
- [ ] Setup/architecture/limitations are updated

## Safety review

- [ ] No secrets, personal paths, private prompts/data, generated environments, or model weights are committed
- [ ] Permission and risk behavior is not weakened
- [ ] Logs and screenshots are sanitized
